title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at New India Assurance Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at New India Assurance Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
New India Assurance Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About New India Assurance Advisory Limited:
New India Assurance Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance Advisory Limited!
